name: Vegetable Pillao (Subsi Pillao)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the ghee or cooking oil in a large, heavy saucepan over medium heat.
2. Peel and thinly slice the onion. Fry in the oil until soft.
3. Add cloves, cardamom pods, cinnamon stick, and cumin seeds. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
4. Stir in garam masala, coriander, chili powder, and black pepper.
5. Remove from heat and set aside.
6. Rinse rice well and remove any debris. Cut carrots into strips (about 2 inches long by 1/4 inch thick).
7. Remove outer leaves from cauliflower and cut into florets.
8. Add the rinsed rice to the spice mixture, returning to heat.
9. Stir in carrots and cauliflower until combined.
10. Pour in vegetable stock and salt; bring to a boil.
11. Simmer for 10 minutes.
12. Add frozen peas and continue cooking for another 10 minutes or until rice is cooked through and tender but still slightly firm (al dente).
